options.systemMessage:
You are an expert HR analyst specializing in evaluating AI-conducted recruitment phone calls. Your job is to analyze call transcripts from Retell AI outbound HR screening calls and extract structured insights.

The calls are made by an AI agent to candidates on behalf of a hiring company. Your analysis must be objective, professional, and actionable for the HR team.

You will receive:
- The full call transcript
- Candidate name and job role they applied for
- Call duration and metadata

You must return ONLY a valid JSON object with no markdown, no explanation, and no extra text. The JSON must strictly follow this schema:

{
  "overall_sentiment": "positive" | "neutral" | "negative",
  "candidate_interest_level": "high" | "medium" | "low",
  "availability_confirmed": true | false,
  "proposed_interview_slots": ["string", ...],
  "candidate_concerns": "string or empty string",
  "key_highlights": "string summarizing notable moments",
  "recommended_action": "schedule_interview" | "follow_up" | "not_interested" | "no_answer" | "voicemail",
  "confidence_score": 1-10,
  "summary": "2-3 sentence plain English summary for the recruiter"
}

Rules:
- If the call was unanswered or went to voicemail, set recommended_action to "no_answer" or "voicemail" and set all other fields to null or empty.
- proposed_interview_slots should list any dates/times the candidate mentioned (e.g., "Monday after 3pm", "anytime next week").
- confidence_score reflects how confident you are in your analysis based on transcript quality (1 = very poor/short call, 10 = full clear conversation).
- Never invent information not present in the transcript.

json.title: AI Automation Intern
json.description:
Job Title: AI Automation Intern  
Department: AI  
Location: Remote  
Job Type: Full-time  
Minimum Experience: 0 years  
Education: BTech or relevant  
Required Skills: relevant role skills  

About the Role  
As an AI Automation Intern, you will assist in developing and implementing automation solutions that enhance our AI capabilities. This role provides an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence.  

Key Responsibilities  
- Assist in the design and development of AI automation tools  
- Collaborate with team members to identify automation opportunities  
- Conduct research on emerging AI technologies and methodologies  
- Support the testing and deployment of automation solutions  
- Document processes and results for future reference  

Required Skills & Qualifications  
- Pursuing or completed a BTech degree or relevant field  
- Basic understanding of AI and machine learning concepts  
- Familiarity with programming languages such as Python or Java  
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills  
- Excellent communication and teamwork abilities  

Nice to Have  
- Experience with automation frameworks or tools  
- Knowledge of data analysis and visualization techniques  
- Familiarity with cloud platforms and services  

What Success Looks Like in This Role  
- Successfully contributing to at least two automation projects during the internship  
- Demonstrating improved efficiency in identified processes by at least 20%  
- Receiving positive feedback from team members and supervisors on collaboration and communication skills  
- Completing all assigned tasks and documentation on time  

Why Join Us  
- Gain valuable experience in the cutting-edge field of AI  
- Work in a supportive and collaborative remote environment  
- Opportunity to learn from industry experts and expand your professional network  
- Contribute to meaningful projects that have a real-world impact

parsed_projects: {"name":"Fake News Detection","description":"Built an end-to-end Fake News Detection model using TF-IDF and Linear SVC to classify news as fake or real with a high accuracy.","technologies":["Python","Scikit-learn","NLP"]}

{"name":"E-commerce Product Comparator Site","description":"Developed a system that fetches live data from Amazon and Flipkart to compare product prices and ratings.","technologies":["Python","SerpAPI","Streamlit"]}

{"name":"Society Management System","description":"Created a management system handling member registrations and maintenance billing with a centralized SQL database.","technologies":["HTML","CSS","JavaScript","PHP","SQL"]}
json.parsed_summary: Adeshkumar Mishra is an AI/ML enthusiast with a solid foundation in data science and machine learning, backed by a recent B.Sc. in Computer Science and ongoing M.Sc. in AI/ML. He possesses strong programming skills in Python and various frameworks, with a notable project experience including a Fake News Detection model achieving 97.49% accuracy. His passion for problem-solving and automation is reflected in his hands-on work during a Data Science Bootcamp and various coding projects.
json.shortlist_reason: Adeshkumar demonstrates strong proficiency in Python and machine learning, which are crucial for the AI Automation Intern role. His ability to analyze data and collaborate on multiple projects further aligns with the expectations for this position.

json.transcript:
User: That's all good. 
User: Hello? 
Agent: Hello! Am I speaking with Harsh Jadhav?
User: Yes. 
Agent: Hi! I'm your AI interviewer calling on behalf of Ukreality. We received your application for the role and we'd love to learn more about you. This conversation should take about 20 minutes. Is now a good time to talk?
User: Yes. Yes. 
Agent: Before we begin, this conversation may be recorded for evaluation purposes. Are you okay with that?
User: Yes. I'm okay with that. 
Agent: Thank you. To start, I have a few eligibility questions.

Can you confirm that you meet all the eligibility criteria listed in the job description for this role?
User: Yes. 
Agent: Could you briefly introduce yourself and tell me about your current academic or professional background?
User: Uh, so, basically, I'm working as an AI automation intern at fourteen solution. 
Agent: Thank you. What interested you in this role?
User: I think the hands on experience with building the automation. 
Agent: Got it. What is your understanding of this role and the kind of work involved?
User: So, basically, our main goal is cut out the manual work and help the businesses to, like, optimize their decisions. 
Agent: Thanks for sharing. Can you describe a specific project where you built or contributed to an automation solution? What tools or technologies did you use?
User: So, basically, I have recently build an ATS system which includes the AI interview, AI hiring, and the multiple factors, and it it is cut the manual work which was done by the companies hiring their employees. 
Agent: Could you give me a specific example of a challenge you faced during that project and how you solved it?
User: So the main problem I have faced during that is I can't get that LinkedIn API, we had done that idea. 
Agent: Thanks for explaining. How did you work around the issue with the LinkedIn API?
User: So the LinkedIn, uh, basically provides that API the developer, but we need the verification for that. 
Agent: I see. Did you end up using any alternative methods or tools to achieve your goal in that part of the project?
User: No. We have, like, make a decision to manually post on LinkedIn. 
Agent: Thank you for clarifying. Can you tell me about a time you collaborated with others on a technical project? What was your role and how did you communicate with your team?
User: Uh, so, basically, uh, we have I have communicated a worked on the with the team by distributing the task So each each of the group team member have their clear clear roles and their predefined task. 
Agent: Thanks for sharing. Can you give a specific example of how you handled a disagreement or different opinion within your team during a project?
User: So, basically, we find the most feasible way perform any task. 
Agent: Could you give me a specific example of a situation where you and a teammate had different ideas, and how you resolved it?
User: I don't have any specific situation. 
User: but we have, like, multiple situation like this. 
Agent: No worries at all, let's move on.

Imagine you’re given a new business process to automate, but you’re not familiar with the tools or systems involved. How would you approach this situation?
User: So, basically, uh, the first thing I would do is read the documentation and predefine things which are available on the web. And try to get some parts from there. 
Agent: Thanks for your answer. When would you ask for help or involve others in this process?
User: No. I have figured out myself. 
Agent: All right. Moving on to a few logistics questions.

When would you be available to start if selected for this role?
User: I would be available in fifteen days. 
Agent: Thank you. What is your preferred work mode—remote, on-site, or hybrid?
User: It would be hybrid. 
Agent: Got it. Are you currently interviewing with any other companies?
User: No. Not yet. 
Agent: We're almost done. Do you have any questions for me about the role or process?
User: Can you give me a brief about the role? 
Agent: I don't have that detail with me right now, but our team will follow up with you after this call.
User: Okay. 
Agent: Thank you so much for your time today, Harsh Jadhav. It was great speaking with you. Our team will review your responses and reach out to you within the expected timeline with the next steps. We appreciate your interest in Ukreality. Have a wonderful day!

Yes.
Could you briefly introduce yourself and tell me about your current academic or professional background?
Uh, so, basically, I'm working as an AI automation intern at fourteen solution.

I think the hands on experience with building the automation.
Got it. What is your understanding of this role and the kind of work involved?
So, basically, our main goal is cut out the manual work and help the businesses to, like, optimize their decisions.
Thanks for sharing. Can you describe a specific project where you built or contributed to an automation solution? What tools or technologies did you use?

So, basically, I have recently build an ATS system which includes the AI interview, AI hiring, and the multiple factors, and it it is cut the manual work which was done by the companies hiring their employees.

but we have, like, multiple situation like this.

No worries at all, let's move on.

So, basically, uh, the first thing I would do is read the documentation and predefine things which are available on the web. And try to get some parts from there.
Thanks for your answer. When would you ask for help or involve others in this process?
No. I have figured out myself.

All right. Moving on to a few logistics questions.

When would you be available to start if selected for this role?
I would be available in fifteen days.
Thank you. What is your preferred work mode—remote, on-site, or hybrid?
It would be hybrid.
Got it. Are you currently interviewing with any other companies?
No. Not yet.
We're almost done. Do you have any questions for me about the role or process?
Can you give me a brief about the role?
I don't have that detail with me right now, but our team will follow up with you after this call.
Okay.

Thank you so much for your time today, Harsh Jadhav. It was great speaking with you. Our team will review your responses and reach out to you within the expected timeline with the next steps. We appreciate your interest in Ukreality. Have a wonderful day!
